description: JSON schemas for all SD input and output message types. design_decision is a persistent log record, not an inbox message, and does not use common_fields.

common_fields.note: Every INBOX message includes these fields. design_decision is exempt — it is a log record not a message.
common_fields.message_type: string — see type list in CLAUDE.md
common_fields.message_id: string — unique ID following CLAUDE.md convention

design_reflection.description: SD produces this after consuming Marko's analysis. Written to sd_to_pm.json — PM relays to Marko. SD sets that subsystem's spec_status to signoff_pending and waits for reflection_signoff before proceeding with that subsystem's design. Other subsystems may continue. Fix 1, Org Structure v2.0.

type_specific_fields.analysis_source: string — file path or description of the Marko analysis document consumed
type_specific_fields.what_was_understood: string — SD's full summary of what it understood. Detailed. No omissions.
type_specific_fields.what_is_being_designed: string — what interfaces, subsystems, and data exchange contracts SD intends to produce
type_specific_fields.assumptions_made: array of strings — every assumption made where the analysis was silent. Each is a statement of fact SD is treating as true until corrected.
type_specific_fields.open_questions: array of strings — things SD cannot determine from the analysis and needs Marko to answer
type_specific_fields.estimated_spec_count: integer — how many interface specification documents this analysis will produce

reflection_signoff.description: Marko's sign-off on a design_reflection. Written by PM on Marko's behalf to pm_to_sd.json. Type code: RSO. SD waits for this per subsystem before releasing that subsystem's spec.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — message_id of the design_reflection being responded to
type_specific_fields.subsystem_id: string — the subsystem this sign-off applies to
type_specific_fields.corrections: array of strings — specific corrections to SD's understanding. Empty array if approved without corrections.
type_specific_fields.additional_context: string — additional analysis context or empty string

spec_release.description: SD releases a completed interface spec to PPM and the relevant SPM. Only issued after reflection_signoff for that subsystem. Type code: SPR.

type_specific_fields.reflection_signoff_id: string — message_id of the RSO that authorised this release. Mandatory. Empty string is a protocol violation.
type_specific_fields.spec_document_path: string — file path to the full spec document
type_specific_fields.dependencies_on_subsystems: array of strings — subsystem_ids this subsystem depends on
type_specific_fields.design_decisions_log_path: string — path to decisions section in spec document

data_exchange_summary_object.name: string
data_exchange_summary_object.direction: string — enum: request_response | event | stream | one_way

design_decision.description: A persistent log record of a significant design decision. NOT an inbox message. Written to sd_state.json decisions_log and to the spec document's design decisions section. Uses prefix DDC. Has no from_role, to_role, status, or message_id — those are inbox message fields and do not apply here.

log_record_fields.decision_id: string — e.g. DDC-SD-0001. Unique. From sequence_counters.
log_record_fields.context: string — what situation required this decision
log_record_fields.rationale: string — full explanation. Mandatory. Never empty.
log_record_fields.consequences: string — what this forecloses or enables

option_object.rejected_because: string — or empty string if this was the chosen option

spec_correction_request.description: Quality or Security sends this to SD when a problem originates in the spec. Type code: SCR. SD responds with spec_correction_response (type code SRR). PPM is always copied. Fix 3, Org Structure v2.0.
spec_correction_request.sender: qa or sec only. SD never sends this type.

type_specific_fields.spec_reference: string — file path or SPR message_id
type_specific_fields.interface_id: string — specific interface ID or empty string if spec-level
type_specific_fields.finding: string — what is wrong, where, why it is a problem
type_specific_fields.proposed_correction: string — proposed fix or empty string
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task IDs blocked until resolved

spec_correction_response.description: SD's response to a spec_correction_request. Type code: SRR — distinct from SCR which belongs to the request. Written within one reporting cycle.

type_specific_fields.in_response_to: string — message_id of the spec_correction_request (SCR-QA-XXXX or SCR-SEC-XXXX)
type_specific_fields.rationale: string — full explanation. Mandatory. Never empty.
type_specific_fields.updated_spec_version: string — new version or empty string
type_specific_fields.updated_spec_path: string — updated file path or empty string
type_specific_fields.ppm_action_required: boolean — whether PPM must notify affected SPMs

interface_dispute.description: Joint submission by two SPMs when they cannot resolve an interface conflict. The SPM that initiates the escalation writes the file. Both are listed as co-authors in the message. Type code: IDP. Fix 4, Org Structure v2.0.
interface_dispute.sender: The initiating SPM writes the file. Both SPM IDs appear in the message body.

type_specific_fields.initiating_spm_id: string — the SPM that wrote this file e.g. spm_vm_lifecycle
type_specific_fields.other_spm_id: string — the co-authoring SPM e.g. spm_cow_engine
type_specific_fields.spec_reference: string — file path or SPR message_id of the relevant spec
type_specific_fields.initiating_spm_position: string — what the initiating SPM believes the contract requires
type_specific_fields.other_spm_position: string — what the other SPM believes the contract requires
type_specific_fields.conflict_description: string — precise description of what they disagree on
type_specific_fields.attempted_resolutions: array of strings — what both tried before escalating
type_specific_fields.blocking_tasks: array of strings — task IDs blocked pending resolution

binding_resolution.description: SD's authoritative resolution of an interface_dispute. Sent to both disputing SPMs and PPM. Binding on receipt. Type code: BRS.

type_specific_fields.resolution: string — the definitive statement of what the interface requires. This is the new truth.
type_specific_fields.rationale: string — full explanation referencing the original spec. Mandatory. Never empty.
type_specific_fields.updated_spec_version: string — new version or empty string
type_specific_fields.updated_spec_path: string — updated file path or empty string
type_specific_fields.affected_tasks: array of strings — task IDs that must be updated
